title: Resolve Meshtastic Position metadata semantics
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.7 can decode the Meshtastic Position fields already represented in local codec tests, but upstream Position has additional metadata and ambiguous semantics that should not be guessed in the first no-hardware bridge. What needs to be done: verify the current upstream Meshtastic Position protobuf schema, decide how to handle accuracy/precision fields, decide precedence when time field 4 and timestamp field 7 disagree, decide whether location_source/altitude_source should influence HAL fix_source/source_name, decide whether accepted Position timestamps must be constrained by build-time/provision epoch floors or staleness policy, and document vectors for those cases.
notes: 2026-07-02 session note: user suggested build-time stamps in firmware or board/provisioning metadata as an epoch floor for GNSS/Position-derived timestamps. Include this as a candidate policy when resolving timestamp staleness/epoch semantics.
